_comment: Scripted Qwen responses for the demo/regression run of the agent in StaticPhotoWorld. 'perception' responses are returned when qwen_call receives image bytes; 'plan' responses when it is text-only (image_bytes is None). Consumed in order within each list. Scenario: hall (1 frontier, no landmarks) -> ROUTINE move -> arrive at 'wrong_room' instead of the expected 'corridor' (deviation) -> re-plan -> reach 'target_area' where the red_mug is visible -> stop/found.
perception: {"place_label":"wrong_room","place_description":"an unexpected storage room","landmarks":[{"name":"odd_statue","description":"a strange plaster statue","bbox_norm":{"x_min":100,"y_min":100,"x_max":300,"y_max":600}}],"objects":[],"frontiers":[{"direction":"forward","description":"path deeper in"},{"direction":"left","description":"a side door"}],"inferred_heading":"east"}

{"place_label":"target_area","place_description":"a lounge with low tables","landmarks":[],"objects":[{"name":"red_mug","description":"a bright red mug on the near table","bbox_norm":{"x_min":500,"y_min":500,"x_max":560,"y_max":560}}],"frontiers":[{"direction":"forward","description":"aisle continuing on"}],"inferred_heading":"east"}
plan: {"reasoning":"Nothing here yet; head down the hall toward the corridor.","action_queue":[{"type":"move","distance":1.0},{"type":"move","distance":1.0}],"expected_next_node":"corridor","goal_status":"searching"}

{"reasoning":"This is a storage room, not the corridor I expected. Reorient toward the target area.","action_queue":[{"type":"turn","degrees":90}],"expected_next_node":"target_area","goal_status":"searching"}
{"reasoning":"The red mug is visible on the table right here. Goal complete.","action_queue":[{"type":"stop","reason":"found the red mug"}],"expected_next_node":"target_area","goal_status":"found"}
